relatedness_reasoning: Risk and Compliance receives loan applications and may freeze accounts based on compliance findings; both files share customer identity concepts (customer_id, full_name) and currency/account details, forming a plausible downstream action pipeline.

mappings.reasoning: No equivalent identifier in inbound schema; system-generated message identifier.
Outbound timestamp likely derived from or based on application submission time, though may be regenerated at freeze action time.
Inbound destination_department is 'Risk and Compliance', which becomes the source system for the outbound message.
Outbound destination 'accounts' is not present in inbound schema; determined by routing rules external to the data.
Message type 'account_freeze_or_block' is a classification of the outbound action, not derived from inbound fields.
Priority level is not present in inbound schema; determined by compliance workflow rules.
Action 'freeze' is a compliance decision output, not derived from inbound loan application data.
IBAN account number is not present in inbound loan application schema; must be looked up from accounts system.
Account holder name corresponds to applicant full_name from the loan application.

Currency code from loan details may inform or correlate with account currency, though account currency is not guaranteed to match loan currency.
Branch location 'London City' is not present in inbound schema; determined by accounts system or customer master data.
Freeze type 'full' is a compliance action classification, not derived from inbound loan application fields.
Freeze reason 'suspected_fraud' may be inferred from default history or risk category, but is not explicitly stated in inbound data.
Description narrative may be constructed from compliance check types and findings, but is not directly present in inbound schema.
Initiator may relate to the compliance officer reviewing the application, but inbound only has submitted_by credit officer.
Department 'Fraud Investigation Unit' is a specific organizational unit not present in inbound schema.
